title: sedum longuetae
intro: Sedum longuetae, also known as dragon's blood sedum, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of sedum longuetae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and its roots can be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
